meaning: adj.作成蜘蛛网状的,有蹼的
examples: Ducks have webbed feet to help them swim.
The webbed feet are used for swimming.
Webbed fingers and toes are sprouting.
Eventually, his webbed feet got so badly worn that he dropped to only average in swimming.
What you don't see is under the water the webbed feet doing like this (demonstrates).
